title: AI/ML Sentiment Analysis System
description: Built a sentiment analysis system on hospital customer reviews using Python and Azure OpenAI to extract actionable insights from text data.

title: Semantic Search for FDA Documents
description: Developed a semantic search tool for unstructured FDA regulatory documents using embeddings and FAISS for efficient retrieval.

title: Streamlit NLP Query Interface
description: Designed an interactive Streamlit interface for document uploads and natural language querying, enabling real-time information access.

title: UI/UX Design for VR Application
description: Collaborated with a UI/UX team to design user flows and interface prototypes for a virtual reality application using Figma.

title: Recipe Preparation Time Prediction
description: Built regression models to predict recipe preparation time from large-scale datasets, applying feature engineering and model evaluation techniques.

title: Box Office Revenue Prediction
description: Predicted movie box office revenue using machine learning models with preprocessing pipelines and cross-validation.

title: Statistical Language Modeling
description: Implemented unigram and n-gram language models and generated text using probabilistic sampling methods.

title: California AB 341 Waste Analysis
description: Conducted time-series analysis on California waste disposal data to evaluate the impact of policy AB 341.

title: Taylor Swift Song Explorer
description: Performed exploratory data analysis on song datasets and built a simple recommender system with visualization tools.

title: Friends TV Show Reboot Analysis
description: Analyzed episode and character data to propose a data-driven reboot strategy using visualization and EDA techniques.

title: Image Processing & KNN Classifier
description: Implemented image processing operations and built a KNN classifier for image recognition using object-oriented design.

title: Audio Processing Toolkit
description: Developed reusable Python classes for audio wave manipulation and signal processing.
